subcodes.first_line: The world is illumined and resplendent with the effulgences of the Sun of Manifestation, yet its inhabitants remain heedless and veiled, save for a few [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عالم از تجلیات انوار شمس ظهور روشن و منیر ولکن اهلش غافل و محجوب الا عده
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement
